name: Szechwan Beef Stir Fry
recipeIngredient: 1 small Red Bell Pepper, cut into 1 inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the beef lengthwise into 2 strips. Slice across the grain into 1/8 inch thick strips.
2. Combine soy sauce, 2 teaspoons sesame oil, sugar, and cornstarch in a bowl; stir to mix.
3. Add the meat mixture to the skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
4. Heat remaining 2 teaspoons sesame oil. Add garlic, ginger, and red pepper flakes; cook for 30 seconds.
5. Add bell pepper and corn; stir fry for 1 1/2 minutes.
6. Add pea pods; stir fry for 30 seconds. Remove vegetables from the skillet or wok.
7. Stir fry beef strips (in batches of about half) for 2 to 3 minutes until cooked through.
8. Return the vegetables and beef to the skillet or wok and heat through.
Serve with hot rice.
Yield: 4 servings.
